title: Specification Review Team Engineer
description:
Job Title : Specification Review Team Engineer

Job Type : Full Time

Job Purpose :-

To review technical specifications and contractual requirements for marine and offshore electrical systems, and to support technical and commercial quotation preparation, ensuring compliance, accuracy, and optimized cost-risk balance.

Key Responsibilities

1. Technical Specification Review

  • Review client specifications, tender documents, shipyard standards, and class requirements for:

Marine propulsion motors and starters
Main switchboards (MSB) and sub-switchboards (SSB)Switchgear, MCCs, and offshore control panels

  • Identify technical requirements, deviations, ambiguities, and risks during the tender and execution phases.
  • Prepare technical clarification questions (TQs / TCs) and deviation lists.

2. Quotation Preparation & Tender Support

  • Support the quotation and tendering process by:

Translating technical specifications into clear quotation scopes and technical descriptions
Defining system configurations, ratings, redundancy concepts, and optional items

  • Prepare or review:

Technical parts of quotations
Scope of supply and exclusions
Technical assumptions and compliance statements

  • Identify specification requirements that impact:

Cost
Delivery schedule
Manufacturing and testing scope (FAT / class witness)

  • Coordinate with procurement and engineering teams for:

Cost estimation
Key component selection (VFDs, breakers, motors, transformers, protection relays)

  • Support clarification meetings with clients, shipyards, and partners during bid evaluation.


3. Standards & Compliance

  • Ensure compliance with applicable standards and regulations, including:

IEC / IEEE standards
IACS class rules (ABS, DNV, LR, BV, CCS, etc.)
Marine and offshore electrical safety requirements

  • Verify ratings such as:

Short-circuit withstand
Insulation level
IP degree
Temperature rise and redundancy requirements

4. Cross-Functional Coordination

  • Act as a technical interface between:

Sales
Engineering
Procurement
Project management

  • Ensure tender requirements are properly transferred into project execution documents after order award.

5. Documentation & Approval

  • Review and comment on:

Single-line diagrams
GA drawings
Control philosophy and functional descriptions
Datasheets and technical calculations

  • Support class approval, client approval, and FAT documentation.

6. Risk & Cost Awareness

  • Highlight commercial and technical risks arising from specifications.
  • Support value engineering and alternative solutions while maintaining compliance.
  • Assist management in technical decision-making during tender and negotiation stages.

Qualifications & Experience

Education

  • Diploma or higher in Power Engineering or Electrical Engineering or Marine Engineering (Electrical)

Experience

  • 1 - 2 years’ experience in Marine or offshore electrical systems Electrical system integration, switchboard manufacturing, or propulsion systems
  • Experience in technical tendering or quotation preparation is highly preferred.
  • Fresh graduates can be considered as junior position.

Technical Knowledge

  • Marine propulsion systems and motor starters (DOL, soft starter, VFD)
  • LV / MV switchboards, MCCs, and protection systems
  • Power distribution, short-circuit levels, and protection coordination
  • Class approval and shipyard working practices

Skills & Competencies

  • Strong specification interpretation and quotation support skills
  • Good commercial awareness and cost sensitivity
  • Clear technical writing and communication skills in English
  • Ability to work with multinational clients, shipyards, and class societies

Preferred (Nice to Have)

  • Offshore platforms, FPSO, DP vessels experience
  • Knowledge of PMS and propulsion control systems
  • FAT / SAT experience

postedCompany.description:
Gennal Engineering Pte Ltd is in business for 22 years from a trading company developed as a system intergation company, we specialise in designing of electrical system for ships such as hybrid electric ship and electric ship using battery. Our design include electrical system configuration, power management and alarms monitoring.


We deliver our system world wide. Till date, there are more than 1,000 ships sailing around the world having at least 1 system design and build by us over the last 15 days.
postedCompany.name: GENNAL ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
